Hey Cu! Here's your lab status 🧪

## 🔬 Cu Lab — Status Report

**Active Project:** Neural Coupling (Neuroscience)
**Field:** Speech/music neural processing, neural coupling, ASD clinical populations

---

### 👥 Team Roster

| Agent | Role | Status |
|-------|------|--------|
| **Scout** | Literature search (PubMed, OpenAlex, arXiv) | 🟡 idle |
| **Stat** | Statistical analysis & study design | 🟡 idle |
| **Quill** | Scientific writing & editing | 🟡 idle |
| **Critic** | Paper review & methodology critique | 🟡 idle |
| **Sage** | Research strategy & grant planning | 🟡 idle |
| **Trend** | Research trend analysis & field mapping | 🟡 idle |
| **Warden** | Reproducibility checks | 🟡 idle |

---

### 📌 Active Quests

- **Find papers about neural coupling in music** → assigned to Scout

Looks like Scout was tasked with that lit search but hasn't been dispatched yet in this session. Want me to kick that off? I'll send Scout out to dig through PubMed, OpenAlex, and arXiv for neural coupling in music papers 🦞
